title: Tower State Schema
description: Schema for validating persistent tower-level memory.

tower_state_id.description: Unique identifier for this tower state instance.

engine_version.description: Version of the engine that created/last saved this tower state.

content_pack_id.description: Identifier of the content pack this tower state belongs to.

current_floor.description: The floor the player is currently on or last visited.

highest_floor_reached.description: The highest floor ever reached in this tower state.

total_runs.description: Total number of runs attempted for this tower state.

total_deaths.description: Total number of player deaths for this tower state.

global_residue.description: Accumulated global residue affecting future tower generation/mutations.

last_outcome.description: The outcome of the last floor resolution.

updated_at.description: Timestamp of the last update to this tower state.
